calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-03-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10.05am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk K. Liu, nothing on record, dept. 525
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Naheed Hamidy present in pro per. Interpreter Roya Kazem on behalf of appellant, translates English to Farsi and Farsi to English. Respondent, Ronald Castro present in pro per. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles.

EXRA: Insurance letters, medical bill and motorcycle receipt; collectively remarked.
EXA1: Dialgran of intersection and Photoes; collectively remarked.
Additional exhibit bank statement drop off at appeal devision after hearing


10:21am
Exhibits retained. Case submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-22-2011 Judgment Entered
